body.title: Route pe_chain cloud calls through UC inference proxy (comms://model/*)
body.result: closed as obsolete — pe_chain coding-sprint mechanism removed 2026-05-23 (commit 06d9b6a5); no target file exists to route
body.proposal: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
body.description:
pe_chain._call_cloud_programming currently makes a raw urllib.request POST directly to openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions. This bypasses the UC inference proxy (lab/utility_closet/transports/inference.py, comms://model/<purpose>) which exists specifically to provide centralized routing, budget tracking, and request/response audit trail. Move the call.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py (_call_cloud_programming implementation); possibly a thin client helper if one doesn't already exist. UC transport (lab/utility_closet/transports/inference.py) already handles the gateway dispatch — pe_chain just needs to construct an inference/request message on comms://model/tier2 (or an appropriate purpose channel) and await the response.
**Design rules:** oop-first (use UC client API, don't re-implement HTTP); docs-in-code; test-plan-or-why-not.
**Scope boundary:** IN — replace raw urllib with UC proxy call for the cloud-programming path. Preserve current behavior for Ollama-local path (already goes through cluster_router). OUT — changing purpose routing conventions (comms://model/tier2 is fine); adding new UC transports.
**Test plan:** (a) unit: _call_cloud_programming with mocked UC client returns text when the gateway responds. (b) integration: pe_chain via UC with a stub inference_gateway verifies the request and response are stored as channel messages (mirrors tests/test_inference_transport.py pattern). (c) regression: existing pe_chain tests still pass.
**Inertia check:** pe_chain.py is HIGH-traffic but not brainstem — MEDIUM at most. Flag before touching if scope guard reports otherwise.
**Gated on:** T-qwen-only-pe-chain-cloud (the default model swap lands first so the proxy route inherits the correct default).

**Note [2026-06-08 11:08]:** pe_chain.py doesn't exist in devices/igor/ — gated on T-igor-rack-tool-migration port question. Both tickets need same prerequisite: Akien decides whether to port pe_chain or close as stale given Igor-coding-retired.
body.approved_plan: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
